## ✅ 检查清单 (Checklist)

<!-- 请确保完成以下所有项目 -->
<!-- Please ensure all items are completed -->

- [ ] 代码遵循项目的代码风格 (Code follows project style guidelines)
- [ ] 已进行自我审查 (Self-review completed)
- [ ] 已添加注释到复杂代码 (Comments added to complex code)
- [ ] 文档已相应更新 (Documentation updated accordingly)
- [ ] 变更不会产生新的警告 (Changes generate no new warnings)
- [ ] 已添加测试证明修复/功能有效 (Tests added to prove fix/feature works)
- [ ] 新依赖和旧依赖兼容 (New and existing dependencies are compatible)
- [ ] 所有测试通过 (All tests pass)
- [ ] 已检查代码安全性 (Code security checked)
